name: Seagen (mc-vc-PABC-MMAE)
advantage: High plasma stability, well-characterized safety, bystander effect.
limitation: Heterogeneity in DAR, potential for off-target toxicity if linker is cleaved by extracellular proteases.

name: Daiichi Sankyo (DXd)
advantage: High DAR without aggregation, potent TOP1 inhibitor, strong bystander effect.
limitation: Requires high internalization for optimal efficacy.

name: Immunomedics (CL2A-SN38)
advantage: Moderate potency payload allows high DAR; pH-sensitive release in tumor microenvironment.
limitation: Relatively short half-life compared to other platforms.

name: ImmunoGen (Maytansinoid)
advantage: Potent tubulin inhibition, versatile linker options (cleavable vs non-cleavable).
limitation: Lysine conjugation leads to high heterogeneity.
